archimate:Stakeholder.name: Individual
archimate:Stakeholder.documentation:
Definition: Individual ABB is a Stakeholder that is a human being who may be dead or alive, but not imaginary.
Source: SEMIC-CPV
Source reference: https://semiceu.github.io/Core-Person-Vocabulary/releases/2.00/#Person
Synonym: Person
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Any instance of a person, for instance, Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Commission. https://ec.europa.eu/commission/commissioners/2019-2024/president_en
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Organisational view
Viewpoint: Interoperability Privacy viewpoint
Interoperability Saliency: The Individual ABB is salient for organizational and behavioural interoperability because it permits the identification of procedures and business rules related to this stakeholder that facilitates the exchange of data, information and knowledge between digital public services and individuals (and vice versa).
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/IndividualStakeholder
ABB name: eira:IndividualStakeholder
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/IndividualStakeholder
Interoperability Layer: Organisational

properties.value: The Individual ABB is salient for organizational and behavioural interoperability because it permits the identification of procedures and business rules related to this stakeholder that facilitates the exchange of data, information and knowledge between digital public services and individuals (and vice versa).
Individual ABB is a Stakeholder that is a human being who may be dead or alive, but not imaginary.

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Any instance of a person, for instance, Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Commission. https://ec.europa.eu/commission/commissioners/2019-2024/president_en
